title: This Week
subtitle: What's happening at the Institute this week — drawn from the public calendar.
audience: Anyone who wants to see and join the Institute's sessions, meetings, and events this week.
lede: The Institute runs a weekly rhythm of public sessions, learning groups, and project meetings. The most current view of what's happening this week is the public Calendar, which lists upcoming sessions soonest-first — so this week's events appear at the top — and lets you search and filter to find a specific session.

sections.heading: This week on the calendar
sections.body: The public Calendar is the single source for what is happening this week. Upcoming events are listed soonest-first, so the sessions running this week sit at the top of the list, and you can use the calendar's on-page search and the upcoming/past filter to narrow to a particular session or kind of event. Because the calendar is generated from the Institute's live event feed, it stays current as sessions are added or change.

sections.heading: The Institute's weekly rhythm
sections.body: Across a typical week the Institute hosts recurring meetings, learning-group sessions, and project sessions, open to participants. These recurring activities are the day-to-day expression of the Institute's programs, and the Activities page gives a fuller picture of the kinds of sessions that make up the rhythm beyond any single week.

sections.heading: Join a session
sections.body: Most sessions are open, and joining one is the easiest first step into the Institute's work. Find a session on the calendar, then use the Get Involved page to learn how to take part and connect with the community. New to Active Inference? The learning resources are a good place to get context before joining.

sections.heading: Full materials
sections.body: The detailed weekly schedule and cadence are maintained on the weekly hub and are being migrated onto this site; the public Calendar above is the live, authoritative view of what is happening week to week.

cards.title: This week's sessions
cards.text: Upcoming events, soonest-first — this week is at the top of the calendar.

cards.title: What runs weekly
cards.text: Recurring meetings, learning groups, and project sessions across the week.

cards.title: Take part
cards.text: Most sessions are open — find one and join in.
